name: replace
description: Workflow: before calling this tool, call read_file for the same path with an inclusive 1-based line range covering the edit region, then call replace. Search the entire file for Ordinal literal matches of old_text (including overlaps). Replace with new_text and write to disk only when there is exactly one match. Zero matches return: replace failed: old text not found, please check whether the old text matches the file. Two or more matches return: replace failed: multiple matches found; increase the scope of old text to make the match unique. old_text is required and non-empty; new_text may be empty to delete old_text. On success the result is usually the literal ok. In some sessions the framework may rewrite this tool result to a longer message beginning with OK. Prior bullet edits were omitted. Focus on the current issues: followed by the latest run_check verifier outputcontinue fixing from that output without repeating the same replace.

oldText.description: Exact substring to locate and replace (required, non-empty).

newText.description: Replacement for oldText only; may be empty to delete oldText.
